audio.transcript: Today's AI engineering briefing. Item 1: PrivAiTe, a local LLM proxy that redacts PII in tool-call arguments. Relevant to Production Ops: Cost, Safety & Multi-Tenancy. Matched Production Ops: Cost, Safety & Multi-Tenancy on: pii. Read it through that lens. Item 2: Show HN: Context Warp Drive – Deterministic context folding for AI agents. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. Matched From Prompts to Harnesses on: agent. Read it through that lens. Item 3: No LLM Involved: What If Your Arrays Could Schedule Themselves?. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. No strong keyword match; defaulted to foundations. Read it through that lens. Item 4: Show HN: TraceGen – realistic OpenTelemetry traces, incl. AI-agent, one binary. Relevant to Evaluation & Observability. Matched Evaluation & Observability on: telemetry, opentelemetry. Read it through that lens. Item 5: My AI Agents Were Working, but I Had No Visibility. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. Matched From Prompts to Harnesses on: agent. Read it through that lens. Item 6: Show HN: The Banana Test: coding agents grow a 3D banana plant'. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. Matched From Prompts to Harnesses on: agent. Read it through that lens.
